subtitle: Manage all aspects of your tenant

horarios.title: Business hours
horarios.description: Define the time range when the chatbot accepts new requests

bienvenida.title: Welcome message
bienvenida.description: First message the user receives when starting the flow
bienvenida.label: Message text
bienvenida.tip: Tip: use a close and empathetic tone 💙

flowKey.title: Flow public key
flowKey.description: Paste the public key Meta will use to encrypt exchanges for this tenant
flowKey.label: RSA public key
flowKey.hint: Generate one key pair per tenant and upload this public key in Meta Business Manager.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Business
whatsapp.description: Credentials to send and receive messages from Meta Cloud API
whatsapp.permissionNote: System user token with whatsapp_business_messaging permission. Get it in Meta Business Manager → System setup.

audioTranscription.title: Audio transcription
audioTranscription.description: Configure per-tenant inbound audio transcription and whether the bot should use it as input.
audioTranscription.hint: Provider key is read from secure tenant config or backend environment variables.

setupGuide.title: Setup assistant (for dummies)
setupGuide.description: Follow these steps in order to connect Meta Flows without signature errors.
setupGuide.beforeStartText: Always use data from the same Meta app. Mixing data from different apps causes 401 Invalid webhook signature.

step1.title: Paste the RSA public key
step1.where: Get it from Meta Flow Encryption and paste it in the 'Flow public key' block on this page.

step2.title: Fill Phone Number ID
step2.where: Get it from Meta WhatsApp Manager → API Setup → Phone Number ID.
step2.hint: Do not use the visible phone number (+1 ...), use the long numeric ID.

step3.title: Fill Access Token
step3.where: Get it from Meta (System User token / Cloud API token) with WhatsApp permissions.
step3.hint: Paste it in Access Token and save credentials.

step4.title: Set App Secret (WA_APP_SECRET)
step4.where: Paste it in the 'App Secret (WA_APP_SECRET)' field on this page.
step4.hint: When you save credentials, it is synced automatically to the server (.env).

step5.title: Test endpoint in Meta Flow
step5.where: In Meta, use this endpoint for the Flow endpoint test.
step5.hint: If everything is aligned, 401 Invalid webhook signature should stop.

email.title: Transactional email
email.description: Configure the tenant SMTP for password reset and conversation flow sends
email.smtpUrlNote: If you fill this URL, it takes priority over host, port and separate credentials.
email.adminUrlNote: This URL is used to build the agent recovery link. If the tenant does not define one, the backend uses environment variables.

llm.title: Artificial Intelligence (LLM)
llm.description: Configure the AI provider the chatbot will use for diagnostics and flow rescue
llm.apiKeyConfigured: API key configured ✓  (leave empty to not change)

puestos.title: Position catalog
puestos.description: Manage the positions available to assign to agents (CRUD).
puestos.errorEmpty: Enter a name for the position.

hierarchy.title: Administrator hierarchy
hierarchy.description: Assign the manager (direct supervisor) of each admin user to build the escalation tree.

enterpriseConfig.title: Enterprise requests
enterpriseConfig.description: Configure advanced behavior of the enterprise requests module

agenda.name: Agenda
agenda.description: Weekly event calendar with agent assignment
agenda.appointmentColorHint: This color is applied to appointment bookings in the calendar.
agenda.agentColorsHint: Each appointment uses its assigned agent color. If an agent has no color, the general color is used.
agenda.agentColorsEmpty: No agents available to configure colors.
agenda.lunchHint: This block defines the gap between morning and afternoon for Monday and Tuesday.
agenda.scheduleHint: Mark available hours per day. The system builds working ranges automatically.

security.title: Security: Account Lockout Policy
security.description: Configure maximum failed login attempts and temporary lockout duration
security.hint: After {maxAttempts} failed attempts, the account will be locked for {lockoutMinutes} minutes.

branding.title: Branding
branding.logoHint: PNG, JPG or SVG. Recommended: 200×60 px.
